description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean white exterior walls and a flat roof. The structure includes a main rectangular building, an attached garage or auxiliary block, and a large open green yard area. There is a visible staircase leading to an upper level or rooftop terrace, and a small circular pool or water feature is present in the yard. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall, and a long driveway or walkway extends from the main building. Windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, and the overall layout emphasizes open outdoor space and geometric forms.
description: A modern white house with a flat roof, open green yard, attached garage, and a rooftop terrace accessed by an exterior staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, green yard, small pool, and the staircase leading to the upper level.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage block, and the open yard with the pool visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the garage, the boundary wall, and a glimpse of the green yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rooftop terrace, staircase, and the circular pool in the yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with steps, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
